title: Extract CLI Validators, Prompts, and Handlers
description: Separate validation, prompting, and business logic from CLI scripts (upstream.ts, write-skill.ts, cleanup.ts) into reusable, testable modules. Create pure validators (validateUpstreamUrl, validateSkillName), prompt helpers (promptForDomain), and handlers (handleAddUpstream, handleWriteSkill) so business logic is decoupled from UI and can be tested without mocking @clack/prompts.
